response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with genuine distributed-systems depth (Sociomantic's micro-services stack handling millions of requests per second) and broad language coverage, but the core competencies this role demands — experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics systems, statistical analysis for experiment quality, and growth engineering — are entirely absent from the resume. There is also no evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope: multi-workstream initiative ownership, cross-team technical strategy, or enterprise-scale architectural leadership are not demonstrated. The AI-agent and developer-tooling work at re:cinq is directionally relevant to the company's domain but does not address the experimentation and measurement engineering that defines this position.
strengths: Production distributed-systems experience at scale: micro-services infrastructure handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic, demonstrating low-latency, high-availability engineering fundamentals
Broad language proficiency across several required stack items (TypeScript/JavaScript, C#, Java, C++) plus DLang for performance-critical systems, satisfying the language breadth requirement on paper
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq) aligns with the company's AI-first engineering culture
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, experiment assignment/targeting, or rollout-risk management — the central technical domain of the role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics design, statistical or experimental analysis skills, or data-driven growth engineering at any point in the career history

No indication of Principal/IC6-level scope: the resume lacks examples of cross-team architectural leadership, multi-workstream initiative ownership, or driving systemic solutions that enabled other teams to move faster

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic
